test_cases.test_case: Navigate between Hotels, Flights, Tours and Cars tabs and verify visible fields
preconditions: Home page is open
steps: 1. Click the 'Hotels' tab
2. Click the 'Flights' tab
3. Click the 'Tours' tab
4. Click the 'Cars' tab
test_cases.expected_result: Hotels tab shows Destination, Check-In Date, Check-Out Date, Number of Rooms, Adults, and Children fields; Flights tab shows Trip Type, Departure City, Arrival City, Departure Date, Return Date, Adults, Children, Infants, and Cabin Class fields; Tours tab shows Destination, Travel Start Date, and Travel End Date fields; Cars tab shows Pick Up Location, Drop Off Location, Pick Up Date, Pick Up Time, Drop Off Date, and Drop Off Time fields.

test_cases.test_case: Perform a Hotels search with all required fields filled
preconditions: Home page is open
steps: 1. Click the 'Hotels' tab
2. Enter <destination> into the Destination field
3. Enter <check-in date> into the Check-In Date field
4. Enter <check-out date> into the Check-Out Date field
5. Enter <number of rooms> into the Number of Rooms field
6. Enter <number of adults> into the Adults field
7. Enter <number of children> into the Children field
8. Click the Search button
test_cases.expected_result: redirects to corresponding results listing page

test_cases.test_case: Perform a Flights Round-trip search with all required fields filled
preconditions: Home page is open
steps: 1. Click the 'Flights' tab
2. Select 'Round-trip' from the Trip Type dropdown
3. Enter <departure city> into the Departure City search field and select a matching result
4. Enter <arrival city> into the Arrival City search field and select a matching result
5. Enter <departure date> into the Departure Date field
6. Enter <return date> into the Return Date field
7. Enter <number of adults> into the Adults field
8. Enter <number of children> into the Children field
9. Enter <number of infants> into the Infants field
10. Select 'Business' from the Cabin Class dropdown
11. Click the Search button
test_cases.expected_result: redirects to corresponding results listing page

test_cases.test_case: Perform a Tours search with destination and travel date range
preconditions: Home page is open
steps: 1. Click the 'Tours' tab
2. Enter <destination> into the Destination field
3. Enter <travel start date> into the Travel Start Date field
4. Enter <travel end date> into the Travel End Date field
5. Click the Search button
test_cases.expected_result: redirects to corresponding results listing page

test_cases.test_case: Perform a Cars search with pick-up/drop-off locations and dates/times
preconditions: Home page is open
steps: 1. Click the 'Cars' tab
2. Enter <pick-up location> into the Pick Up Location search field and select a matching result
3. Enter <drop-off location> into the Drop Off Location search field and select a matching result
4. Enter <pick-up date> into the Pick Up Date field
5. Enter <pick-up time> into the Pick Up Time field
6. Enter <drop-off date> into the Drop Off Date field
7. Enter <drop-off time> into the Drop Off Time field
8. Click the Search button
test_cases.expected_result: redirects to corresponding results listing page

test_cases.test_case: Hotels tab — leave Destination (search) blank and submit
preconditions: User is on the Home Page with the Hotels tab active
steps: 1. Ensure the Hotels tab is active
2. Leave the Destination field blank
3. Click the Search button
test_cases.expected_result: Destination field displays an inline validation error indicating it is required; the Search action is blocked (form does not submit) and the user remains on the Home Page (no results listing page is opened).

test_cases.test_case: Hotels tab — leave a representative number field (Number of Rooms) blank and submit
preconditions: User is on the Home Page with the Hotels tab active
steps: 1. Ensure the Hotels tab is active
2. Leave the Number_of_Rooms field blank
3. Click the Search button
test_cases.expected_result: Number_of_Rooms field displays an inline validation error indicating a numeric value is required and that the field is required; the Search action is blocked (form does not submit) and the user remains on the Home Page (no results listing page is opened).

test_cases.test_case: Hotels tab — leave a representative date field (Check-In Date) blank and submit
preconditions: User is on the Home Page with the Hotels tab active
steps: 1. Ensure the Hotels tab is active
2. Leave the Check_In_Date field blank
3. Click the Search button
test_cases.expected_result: Check_In_Date field displays an inline validation error indicating it is required and must be a valid date; the Search action is blocked (form does not submit) and the user remains on the Home Page (no results listing page is opened).

test_cases.test_case: Flights tab — leave Trip Type (dropdown) unselected and submit
preconditions: User is on the Home Page with the Flights tab active
steps: 1. Click the Flights tab to activate it
2. Leave the Trip_Type dropdown unselected / set to no value
3. Click the Search button
test_cases.expected_result: Trip_Type dropdown displays an inline validation error indicating it is required; the Search action is blocked (form does not submit) and the user remains on the Home Page (no results listing page is opened).

test_cases.test_case: Flights tab — enter non-numeric input in numeric field (Adults) and submit
preconditions: User is on the Home Page with the Flights tab active
steps: 1. Click the Flights tab to activate it
2. Enter <non-numeric input> into the Adults field
3. Click the Search button
test_cases.expected_result: Adults field displays an inline validation error indicating a numeric value is required (e.g. 'must be a number'); the Search action is blocked (form does not submit) and the user remains on the Home Page (no results listing page is opened).

test_cases.test_case: Flights tab — enter invalid date format into Departure Date and submit
preconditions: User is on the Home Page with the Flights tab active
steps: 1. Click the Flights tab to activate it
2. Enter <invalid date format> into the Departure_Date field
3. Click the Search button
test_cases.expected_result: Departure_Date field displays an inline validation error indicating the date is invalid or in an incorrect format; the Search action is blocked (form does not submit) and the user remains on the Home Page (no results listing page is opened).

test_cases.test_case: Active tab with all required fields empty — submit with every required field blank
preconditions: User is on the Home Page and has activated the Flights tab
steps: 1. Click the Flights tab to activate it
2. Ensure all visible fields on the Flights tab are left blank (Trip_Type, Departure_City, Arrival_City, Departure_Date, Return_Date, Adults, Children, Infants, Cabin_Class)
3. Click the Search button
test_cases.expected_result: Inline validation errors appear on each required field: Trip_Type, Departure_City, Arrival_City, Departure_Date, Adults (and any other required visible fields); the Search action is blocked (form does not submit), multiple fields are highlighted with their respective inline errors, and the user remains on the Home Page (no results listing page is opened).

test_cases.test_case: Hotels: Check-out date equal to check-in date (same-day) is blocked
preconditions: Home page is loaded
Hotels tab is active
steps: 1. Enter a valid value in Destination
2. Enter a date in Check_In_Date
3. Enter <the same day as Check_In_Date> in Check_Out_Date
4. Enter values in Number_of_Rooms, Adults (and Children if required)
5. Click the Search button
test_cases.expected_result: Search is blocked; the Check_Out_Date field displays an inline error indicating the check-out date must be after the check-in date (visible inline error on the Check_Out_Date field).

test_cases.test_case: Hotels: Check-out date one day after check-in succeeds
preconditions: Home page is loaded
Hotels tab is active
steps: 1. Enter a valid value in Destination
2. Enter a date in Check_In_Date
3. Enter <one day after Check_In_Date> in Check_Out_Date
4. Enter values in Number_of_Rooms, Adults (and Children if required)
5. Click the Search button
test_cases.expected_result: Search succeeds; user is redirected to the Hotels results listing page (results page loads for the Hotels search).

test_cases.test_case: Flights (Round-trip): Return date equal to departure date (same-day return) succeeds
preconditions: Home page is loaded
Flights tab is active
Trip_Type is set to Round-trip
steps: 1. Select Trip_Type = Round-trip
2. Enter a valid value in Departure_City
3. Enter a valid value in Arrival_City
4. Enter a date in Departure_Date
5. Enter <the same day as Departure_Date> in Return_Date
6. Enter values for Adults (and Children/Infants if required) and select Cabin_Class
7. Click the Search button
test_cases.expected_result: Search succeeds; user is redirected to the Flights results listing page for the specified round-trip (results page loads showing flights for the same-day return).

test_cases.test_case: Flights (Round-trip): Return date one day before departure is blocked
preconditions: Home page is loaded
Flights tab is active
Trip_Type is set to Round-trip
steps: 1. Select Trip_Type = Round-trip
2. Enter a valid value in Departure_City
3. Enter a valid value in Arrival_City
4. Enter a date in Departure_Date
5. Enter <one day before Departure_Date> in Return_Date
6. Enter values for Adults (and Children/Infants if required) and select Cabin_Class
7. Click the Search button
test_cases.expected_result: Search is blocked; the Return_Date field displays an inline error indicating the return date cannot be before the departure date (visible inline error on the Return_Date field).

test_cases.test_case: Tours: Travel end date equal to start date (same-day tour) succeeds
preconditions: Home page is loaded
Tours tab is active
steps: 1. Enter a valid value in Destination
2. Enter a date in Travel_Start_Date
3. Enter <the same day as Travel_Start_Date> in Travel_End_Date
4. Click the Search button
test_cases.expected_result: Search succeeds; user is redirected to the Tours results listing page (results page loads showing tours that match the same-day range).

test_cases.test_case: Tours: Travel end date one day before start date is blocked
preconditions: Home page is loaded
Tours tab is active
steps: 1. Enter a valid value in Destination
2. Enter a date in Travel_Start_Date
3. Enter <one day before Travel_Start_Date> in Travel_End_Date
4. Click the Search button
test_cases.expected_result: Search is blocked; the Travel_End_Date field displays an inline error indicating the travel end date must be the same as or after the travel start date (visible inline error on Travel_End_Date).

test_cases.test_case: Hotels Destination with leading and trailing whitespace is trimmed in search
preconditions: Home page is loaded
Hotels tab is active
steps: 1. Enter <value with leading and trailing whitespace> into Destination (Hotels)
2. Enter valid dates in Check_In_Date and Check_Out_Date
3. Enter values in Number_of_Rooms and Adults
4. Click the Search button
test_cases.expected_result: Search succeeds; user is redirected to the Hotels results listing page and the search summary at the top shows the Destination value trimmed of leading/trailing whitespace (visible trimmed value in the search summary).

test_cases.test_case: Rapid double-click on Search triggers a single search (no duplicate results pages)
preconditions: Home page is loaded
Any tab is active with all required fields filled
steps: 1. Fill all required fields for the active tab
2. Rapidly double-click the Search button (two clicks in quick succession)
test_cases.expected_result: Search succeeds once; user is redirected a single time to the corresponding results listing page and the results listing displays only one set of results (no duplicate results pages or duplicate result sets visible).

test_cases.test_case: Successful registration with automatic login and redirect to Dashboard
preconditions: User not logged in
System setting: new registrations do NOT require email verification
No existing account with <unique email>
steps: 1. Open the Registration page
2. Enter <valid first name> in the First Name field
3. Enter <valid last name> in the Last Name field
4. Enter <unique email> in the Email field
5. Enter <valid password> in the Password field
6. Enter the same <valid password> in the Confirm Password field
7. Select <country code> from the Country Code dropdown
8. Enter <valid mobile number> in the Mobile Number field
9. (Optional) Enter <address> in the Address field
10. Select <country> from the Country dropdown
11. Check the Terms and Conditions checkbox
12. Click the Register button
test_cases.expected_result: Browser navigates to the Dashboard page and the Dashboard UI is displayed (user is shown the logged-in Dashboard view)

test_cases.test_case: Successful registration that prompts user to verify email before gaining access
preconditions: User not logged in
System setting: new registrations REQUIRE email verification
No existing account with <unique email>
steps: 1. Open the Registration page
2. Enter <valid first name> in the First Name field
3. Enter <valid last name> in the Last Name field
4. Enter <unique email> in the Email field
5. Enter <valid password> in the Password field
6. Enter the same <valid password> in the Confirm Password field
7. Select <country code> from the Country Code dropdown
8. Enter <valid mobile number> in the Mobile Number field
9. (Optional) Enter <address> in the Address field
10. Select <country> from the Country dropdown
11. Check the Terms and Conditions checkbox
12. Click the Register button
test_cases.expected_result: A verification-required screen or message is shown informing the user they must verify their email before gaining access; an option to resend the verification email or instructions to check their email is visible

test_cases.test_case: Submit with all required fields empty
preconditions: User is on the Registration page (not logged in)
steps: 1. Ensure all form fields are empty and the Terms and Conditions checkbox is unchecked
2. Click the Register button
test_cases.expected_result: Inline validation errors appear on all required fields: First Name, Last Name, Email, Password, Confirm Password, Country Code, Mobile Number, Country, and the Terms and Conditions checkbox indicating each is required; the form does not submit and no account is created.

2. Fill all other required fields with valid values: Last Name: <valid last name>, Email: <valid unique email>, Password: <valid password>, Confirm Password: <same as Password>, Country Code: <valid country code>, Mobile Number: <valid numeric mobile>, Country: <valid country>, accept Terms and Conditions
3. Click the Register button
test_cases.expected_result: Inline validation error appears on the First Name field indicating it is required; the form does not submit and no account is created.

3. Click the Register button
test_cases.expected_result: Inline validation error appears on the Email field indicating it is required; the form does not submit and no account is created.

3. Click the Register button
test_cases.expected_result: Inline validation error appears on the Terms and Conditions checkbox indicating it must be accepted; the form does not submit and no account is created.

steps: 1. Leave the Mobile Number field blank

3. Click the Register button

test_cases.test_case: Register with an email that already exists (email uniqueness violation)

steps: 1. Enter <email already in system> in the Email field

2. Fill all other required fields with valid values: First Name: <valid first name>, Last Name: <valid last name>, Password: <valid password>, Confirm Password: <same as Password>, Country Code: <valid country code>, Mobile Number: <valid numeric mobile>, Country: <valid country>, accept Terms and Conditions

test_cases.test_case: Double-click Register to attempt duplicate account creation
preconditions: Registration page is open
steps: 1. Enter <valid first name> in First_Name
2. Enter <valid last name> in Last_Name
3. Enter <valid email> in Email
4. Enter <matching password> in Password
5. Enter <matching password> in Confirm_Password
6. Select a value in Country_Code
7. Enter <valid mobile number> in Mobile_Number
8. Select a value in Country
9. Check Terms_and_Conditions
10. Click Register twice rapidly (double-click)
test_cases.expected_result: Registration succeeds once; account creation proceeds for the first click and the second rapid submission is blocked / error shown (no duplicate account is created for the same Email). Visible outcome: user sees success flow (redirect to dashboard or email verification prompt) and only one account exists for that Email.

test_cases.test_case: Email entered with leading and trailing whitespace
preconditions: Registration page is open
steps: 1. Enter <valid first name> in First_Name
2. Enter <valid last name> in Last_Name
3. Enter <valid email> with leading and trailing spaces in Email (e.g., ' <valid email> ')
4. Enter <matching password> in Password
5. Enter <matching password> in Confirm_Password
6. Select a value in Country_Code
7. Enter <valid mobile number> in Mobile_Number
8. Select a value in Country
9. Check Terms_and_Conditions
10. Click Register
test_cases.expected_result: Leading/trailing whitespace is trimmed and registration succeeds; saved account shows the Email without leading/trailing spaces (visible on the success/confirmation or profile view) OR, if the UI rejects whitespace, submission is blocked and Email field displays an inline error indicating invalid format. (Test verifies which visible behavior occurs.)

test_cases.test_case: Confirm_Password differs only by trailing whitespace from Password
preconditions: Registration page is open
steps: 1. Enter <valid first name> in First_Name
2. Enter <valid last name> in Last_Name
3. Enter <valid email> in Email
4. Enter <password> in Password
5. Enter <password plus a trailing space> in Confirm_Password
6. Select a value in Country_Code
7. Enter <valid mobile number> in Mobile_Number
8. Select a value in Country
9. Check Terms_and_Conditions
10. Click Register
test_cases.expected_result: Submission is blocked; Confirm_Password displays an inline error indicating it must match Password (the 'must match Password' validation fails) and account creation does not proceed (is blocked / error shown).

steps: 1. Enter <valid first name> in First_Name

4. Enter <matching password> in Password

(Test verifies whether long Address is preserved or truncated and reports the visible outcome.)

Login page is open
Google_Enabled == true

Facebook_Enabled == true
steps: 1. Click the 'Sign in with Facebook' button

Login page is open
steps: 1. Click the Forgot Password? link

test_cases.test_case: Email field: invalid email format is rejected

CAPTCHA not required (requires_captcha == false)
steps: 1. Enter <invalid email format> in the Email field
2. Enter <valid password> in the Password field

test_cases.test_case: CAPTCHA required after multiple failed attempts — submitting without CAPTCHA is blocked
preconditions: User is on the Login page
System configured to require CAPTCHA after multiple failed attempts
steps: 1. Enter <invalid email> in the Email field

test_cases.test_case: Invalid credentials produce error and clear Password field

test_cases.test_case: Social login button not available when provider is disabled

User is on the Login page

test_cases.test_case: CAPTCHA becomes visible after reaching the failed-attempt threshold
preconditions: User is on the Login page

2. Repeat the following sequence <threshold failed attempts> times: Enter an invalid Password in the Password field
3. Repeat the following sequence <threshold failed attempts> times: Click the Login button
4. Observe the Login form for newly revealed fields
test_cases.expected_result: CAPTCHA field becomes visible and is marked required on the Login form; this succeeds (CAPTCHA visibility change is present in the UI)

test_cases.test_case: Submission blocked when attempting an extra login after CAPTCHA requirement is in effect and CAPTCHA is left blank
preconditions: User is on the Login page
steps: 1. Repeat the following sequence <threshold> times: Enter an invalid Email in the Email field
2. Repeat the following sequence <threshold> times: Enter an invalid Password in the Password field
3. Repeat the following sequence <threshold> times: Click the Login button
4. On attempt number <threshold + 1>: Enter an invalid Email in the Email field
5. On attempt number <threshold + 1>: Enter an invalid Password in the Password field
6. Ensure the CAPTCHA field is visible and leave the CAPTCHA input blank
7. Click the Login button
test_cases.expected_result: Submission is blocked and a visible inline error is shown indicating CAPTCHA is required; the Password field is cleared after the failed attempt (error shown and password cleared)

test_cases.test_case: Very long input into revealed CAPTCHA field is rejected with a visible validation message
preconditions: User is on the Login page

steps: 1. Repeat the following sequence <threshold> times: Enter an invalid Email in the Email field
2. Repeat the following sequence <threshold> times: Enter an invalid Password in the Password field
3. Repeat the following sequence <threshold> times: Click the Login button
4. Enter an invalid Email in the Email field
5. Enter an invalid Password in the Password field
6. Enter a very long string (200+ characters) into the CAPTCHA field
7. Click the Login button
test_cases.expected_result: Submission is blocked and an inline validation error is shown for the CAPTCHA input (visible error indicating CAPTCHA input exceeds allowed length or is invalid); the CAPTCHA validation error is visible to the user

test_cases.test_case: Rapid double-click of the Login button results in a single authentication attempt and no duplicate error messages

test_cases.expected_result: Only one authentication attempt is processed; only one error message is shown and the Password field is cleared once; duplicate submission is blocked / no duplicate error entries appear

test_cases.test_case: Submit Forgot Password with an email not in the system
preconditions: User is on the Forgot Password page
steps: 1. Enter <email not in system> in the Email field
2. Click the Reset Password button
test_cases.expected_result: Form does not submit; page displays the error 'email not found' and the form remains editable; no reset link is sent

test_cases.test_case: Click an expired Password Reset Link
preconditions: User has an <expired reset link> (older than 24 hours)
steps: 1. Click the Password Reset Link
test_cases.expected_result: Navigation is blocked: user is not taken to the Password_Reset_Page; a visible error indicates the reset link is invalid or expired; no password-reset form is shown and no password can be changed

test_cases.test_case: Attempt to Change Password using an expired reset link
preconditions: User has opened the Password_Reset_Page via an <expired reset link>
steps: 1. Enter <new password> in the New_Password field
2. Enter <new password> in the Confirm_Password field
3. Click the Change Password button
test_cases.expected_result: Change Password is blocked due to precondition failure; password is not changed; a visible error indicates the reset link is invalid or expired and the form remains editable

test_cases.test_case: Submit Password Reset with all required password fields empty
preconditions: User is on the Password_Reset_Page via a <valid reset link>
steps: 1. Leave the New_Password field blank
2. Leave the Confirm_Password field blank
3. Click the Change Password button
test_cases.expected_result: Inline validation errors appear on both New_Password and Confirm_Password fields indicating they are required; the form does not submit and the password is not changed

test_cases.test_case: Submit Password Reset with mismatched confirmation
preconditions: User is on the Password_Reset_Page via a <valid reset link>
steps: 1. Enter <new password> in the New_Password field
2. Enter <different password> in the Confirm_Password field
3. Click the Change Password button
test_cases.expected_result: Confirm_Password field displays an error: 'must match New_Password'; the form does not submit and the password is not changed

test_cases.test_case: Use password reset link at exactly 24 hours after issuance
preconditions: A password reset link was issued to <existing account email> at time T (link URL available)
steps: 1. Open the password reset link URL at time = T + 24 hours (exactly 24 hours after issuance)
2. Observe whether the app navigates to Password_Reset_Page or shows an error
test_cases.expected_result: Clicking the Password Reset Link is blocked; the UI displays a visible error indicating the link has expired (link does not navigate to Password_Reset_Page) — is blocked / error shown

test_cases.test_case: Use password reset link just under the 24-hour expiration boundary
preconditions: A password reset link was issued to <existing account email> at time T (link URL available)
steps: 1. Open the password reset link URL at time = T + (24 hours minus 1 second)
2. Observe whether the app navigates to Password_Reset_Page
test_cases.expected_result: Clicking the Password Reset Link succeeds; the app navigates to Password_Reset_Page and displays the New_Password and Confirm_Password fields — succeeds

test_cases.test_case: Change password when Confirm_Password exactly matches New_Password
preconditions: User is on Password_Reset_Page reached via a valid (not expired) reset link
steps: 1. Enter <New_Password> in the New_Password field
2. Enter the exact same <New_Password> value in the Confirm_Password field
3. Click the Change Password button
test_cases.expected_result: Form submits successfully; password is changed and the user is redirected to the login page with a success message — succeeds

test_cases.test_case: Change password when Confirm_Password differs by one character from New_Password
preconditions: User is on Password_Reset_Page reached via a valid (not expired) reset link
steps: 1. Enter <New_Password> in the New_Password field
2. Enter a value in Confirm_Password that differs by one character from New_Password
3. Click the Change Password button
test_cases.expected_result: Confirm_Password displays an inline validation error indicating it 'must match New_Password' and the password change is blocked — is blocked / error shown

test_cases.test_case: Submit Reset Password with Email containing leading and trailing whitespace (existing account)
preconditions: There exists an account for <existing account email>
steps: 1. Enter the existing account email with leading and trailing spaces around it in the Email field (e.g., ' <existing account email> ' )
2. Click the Reset Password button
test_cases.expected_result: Form trims leading/trailing whitespace and submits successfully; confirmation message is shown indicating a reset link was sent to the email — succeeds (trimmed and link sent)

test_cases.test_case: Enter a very long value in the Email field (200+ characters) and attempt reset
preconditions: Forgot Password form is displayed
steps: 1. Enter a very long string (> 200 characters) in the Email field
2. Click the Reset Password button
test_cases.expected_result: Email field displays an inline validation error indicating the value is too long or invalid and the form is not submitted; no confirmation message is shown — is blocked / error shown

test_cases.test_case: Double-click the Reset Password button rapidly
preconditions: Forgot Password form is displayed and Email contains a valid/recognized address
steps: 1. Enter <existing account email> in the Email field
2. Rapidly double-click the Reset Password button (two clicks in quick succession)
test_cases.expected_result: Second submission attempt is blocked by the UI; only one confirmation message is shown and the form does not trigger duplicate visible confirmations — second submission is blocked / single confirmation visible

test_cases.test_case: Double-click the Change Password button on Password_Reset_Page
preconditions: User is on Password_Reset_Page reached via a valid (not expired) reset link
New_Password and Confirm_Password have been entered and match
steps: 1. Rapidly double-click the Change Password button (two clicks in quick succession)
2. Observe resulting navigation and messages
test_cases.expected_result: Only a single password-change action completes; user is redirected once to the login page with one success message and duplicate redirects or duplicate success messages do not appear — second submission is blocked / single redirect and message visible

test_cases.test_case: Search form happy path redirects to listing page
preconditions: User logged in as <Traveler>
steps: 1. Navigate to the Hotels Search page
2. Enter <destination> in the Destination field
3. Enter <check-in date> in the Check In field and <check-out date> in the Check Out field
4. Enter <number of rooms> in the Rooms field, <number of adults> in the Adults field, and <number of children> in the Children field
5. Click the Search button
test_cases.expected_result: redirects to Listing page

test_cases.test_case: Sort results by Price: Low to High updates hotel order

steps: 1. Navigate to the Hotels Search page
2. Enter <destination> and valid <check-in date> and <check-out date>, then click Search to open the Hotels Listing page
3. On the Listing page, open the Sort dropdown
4. Select 'Price: Low to High' from the Sort dropdown
test_cases.expected_result: Hotel Results list is reordered showing hotels sorted by 'Price: Low to High' (lowest starting price first)

test_cases.test_case: Apply Star Rating filter shows active filter tag and filters results
preconditions: User logged in as <Traveler>
steps: 1. Navigate to the Hotels Search page
2. Enter <destination> and valid <check-in date> and <check-out date>, then click Search to open the Hotels Listing page
3. In the Filters sidebar, expand the Star Rating panel
4. Select <selected star rating> in the Star Rating filter
test_cases.expected_result: Active Filters Summary shows a filter tag for <selected star rating>; Hotel Results displays only hotels matching <selected star rating>; unrelated hotels are no longer visible

test_cases.test_case: Remove a single active filter updates results to include broadened set
preconditions: User logged in as <Traveler>
steps: 1. Navigate to the Hotels Search page
2. Enter <destination> and valid <check-in date> and <check-out date>, then click Search to open the Hotels Listing page
3. In the Filters sidebar, apply <selected star rating> so an active filter tag appears in Active Filters Summary
4. Click the Remove button on the <selected star rating> active filter tag
test_cases.expected_result: The active filter tag for <selected star rating> is no longer visible in the Active Filters Summary; Hotel Results now include hotels that do not match <selected star rating> (results updated dynamically)

test_cases.test_case: Reset all clears filters and restores full unfiltered results
preconditions: User logged in as <Traveler>
steps: 1. Navigate to the Hotels Search page
2. Enter <destination> and valid <check-in date> and <check-out date>, then click Search to open the Hotels Listing page
3. In the Filters sidebar, apply multiple filters (e.g., <price range> and <selected star rating>) so multiple active filter tags appear in Active Filters Summary
4. Click the 'Reset all' button in the Active Filters Summary
test_cases.expected_result: All filter tags are removed from the Active Filters Summary; Hotel Results display the full unfiltered list of hotels (previously hidden hotels are visible again)

test_cases.test_case: Click Book Now on a hotel card initiates booking flow
preconditions: User logged in as <Traveler>
steps: 1. Navigate to the Hotels Search page
2. Enter <destination> and valid <check-in date> and <check-out date>, then click Search to open the Hotels Listing page
3. On a Hotel Card in the results, click the 'Book Now' button
test_cases.expected_result: redirects to Booking page

test_cases.test_case: Invalid date format in Check_In blocks search
preconditions: User is on the Hotels Search form/page
steps: 1. Enter <invalid/impossible date> in the Check_In field
2. Click the Search button
test_cases.expected_result: An inline validation error appears on the Check_In field indicating the date is invalid (e.g. 'Enter a valid date'); the form does not submit; the user is not redirected to the Listing page and no search results are shown.

test_cases.test_case: Non-numeric input in Adults field is rejected
preconditions: User is on the Hotels Search form/page
steps: 1. Enter <non-numeric input> in the Adults field
2. Click the Search button
test_cases.expected_result: An inline validation error appears on the Adults field indicating a numeric value is required (e.g. 'Must be a number'); the form does not submit; the user is not redirected to the Listing page and no search results are shown.

test_cases.test_case: Very long Destination string is accepted and shown on Listing page
preconditions: Hotels Search form is open
steps: 1. Focus the Destination search field
2. Enter <very long string> in the Destination field
3. Click the Search button
test_cases.expected_result: Search action succeeds: user is redirected to the Listing page; the search input on the Listing page displays the entered <very long string> (visible in the page header or search box) and no inline error is shown; Hotel_Results are displayed (may be empty) reflecting the search.

test_cases.test_case: Destination containing special characters and emoji is accepted and displayed
preconditions: Hotels Search form is open
steps: 1. Focus the Destination search field
2. Enter <string with special characters and emoji> in the Destination field
3. Click the Search button
test_cases.expected_result: Search action succeeds: user is redirected to the Listing page; the search input on the Listing page displays the exact entered special characters/emoji (visible) and no UI error is shown; Hotel_Results update according to the search.

test_cases.test_case: Leading and trailing whitespace in Destination is handled (trimmed) on search
preconditions: Hotels Search form is open
steps: 1. Focus the Destination search field
2. Enter <value with leading/trailing spaces> in the Destination field
3. Click the Search button
test_cases.expected_result: Search action succeeds: user is redirected to the Listing page; the search input and any Active_Filters_Summary tag show the Destination value with leading/trailing whitespace trimmed (visible trimmed value) and no inline error is shown.

test_cases.test_case: Rapid double-click of Search button results in single search/navigation
preconditions: Hotels Search form is open
steps: 1. Optionally enter a Destination or leave fields blank
2. Double-click the Search button rapidly (two clicks in quick succession)
test_cases.expected_result: Only one search action is processed and succeeds: the user is redirected to the Listing page once; the Listing page and Hotel_Results load a single time; the second rapid click is ignored and no duplicate listing pages or duplicate result sets appear.

test_cases.test_case: Select a room opens Booking Form and pre-populates price and selection fields

Hotel has at least one available room type in the Room Types list
steps: 1. Click 'Select Room' on a room row in the Room Types list

test_cases.test_case: Booking Form displays price breakdown fields with currency formatting after selecting a room

Hotel has at least one available room type
steps: 1. Click 'Select Room' on a room row in the Room Types list to open the Booking Form
2. Observe the Booking Form price fields
test_cases.expected_result: Booking Form displays Room_Rate, Taxes, Fees, and Total fields and each is shown with currency formatting

test_cases.test_case: Submit booking with ALL required fields empty
preconditions: User is logged in
Hotel Details page is open
steps: 1. On Hotel Details page, click the Select Room button for a room to open the Booking Form
2. Leave the Check_In field blank
3. Leave the Check_Out field blank
4. Leave the Guest_Count field blank
5. Leave the First_Name field blank
6. Leave the Last_Name field blank
7. Leave the Email field blank
8. Leave the Phone_Number field blank
9. Click the Book Now button
test_cases.expected_result: Form does not submit; inline validation errors appear on required fields: Check_In field displays an inline error indicating it is required; Check_Out field displays an inline error indicating it is required; Guest_Count field displays an inline error indicating it is required; First_Name field displays an inline error indicating it is required; Last_Name field displays an inline error indicating it is required; Email field displays an inline error indicating it is required; Phone_Number field displays an inline error indicating it is required. User remains on the Booking Form and is not redirected to Payment page.

test_cases.test_case: Leave First Name (text) blank and attempt to book
preconditions: User is logged in
Booking Form is open for a selected room
steps: 1. On Hotel Details page, click the Select Room button for a room to open the Booking Form
2. In the Booking Form, enter valid values for Check_In, Check_Out, Guest_Count, Last_Name, Email, and Phone_Number
3. Leave the First_Name field blank
4. Click the Book Now button
test_cases.expected_result: Form does not submit; First_Name field displays an inline validation error indicating it is required. User remains on the Booking Form and is not redirected to Payment page.

test_cases.test_case: Enter invalid email format in Email field
preconditions: User is logged in
Booking Form is open for a selected room
steps: 1. On Hotel Details page, click the Select Room button for a room to open the Booking Form
2. Enter valid values for First_Name and Last_Name
3. Enter <invalid email format> in the Email field
4. Enter valid values for Phone_Number, Check_In, Check_Out, and Guest_Count
5. Click the Book Now button
test_cases.expected_result: Form does not submit; Email field displays an inline validation error indicating the email format is invalid (e.g. 'Enter a valid email address'). User remains on the Booking Form and is not redirected to Payment page.

test_cases.test_case: Enter a non-numeric value into Guest Count (number) field
preconditions: User is logged in
Booking Form is open for a selected room
steps: 1. On Hotel Details page, click the Select Room button for a room to open the Booking Form
2. Enter valid values for First_Name, Last_Name, Email, Phone_Number, Check_In, and Check_Out
3. Enter <non-numeric value> in the Guest_Count field
4. Click the Book Now button
test_cases.expected_result: Form does not submit; Guest_Count field displays an inline validation error indicating a numeric value is required (e.g. 'Enter a valid number'). User remains on the Booking Form and is not redirected to Payment page.

test_cases.test_case: Submit with Check-Out date earlier than Check-In date
preconditions: User is logged in
Booking Form is open for a selected room
steps: 1. On Hotel Details page, click the Select Room button for a room to open the Booking Form
2. Enter <valid check-in date> in the Check_In field
3. Enter <a date earlier than the Check_In date> in the Check_Out field
4. Enter valid values for First_Name, Last_Name, Email, Phone_Number, and Guest_Count
5. Click the Book Now button
test_cases.expected_result: Form does not submit; Check_Out field displays an inline validation error: 'Check-out date must be after check-in date'. Booking is not created and the user is not redirected to Payment page.

test_cases.test_case: Guest count exceeds the selected room's maximum occupancy
preconditions: User is logged in
Hotel Details page is open
steps: 1. On Hotel Details page, identify a room row that lists a Max_Occupancy
2. Click the Select Room button for that room to open the Booking Form
3. Enter <guest count exceeding room's Max_Occupancy> in the Guest_Count field
4. Enter valid values for First_Name, Last_Name, Email, Phone_Number, Check_In, and Check_Out
5. Click the Book Now button
test_cases.expected_result: Form does not submit; Guest_Count field displays an inline validation error indicating the guest count exceeds the room's maximum occupancy (e.g. 'Guest count cannot exceed Max occupancy'). Booking is not created and user is not redirected to Payment page.

test_cases.test_case: Attempt to Book Now while not logged in (precondition failure)
preconditions: User is NOT logged in
Hotel Details page is open
steps: 1. On Hotel Details page, click the Select Room button for a room to open the Booking Form
2. Enter valid values for First_Name, Last_Name, Email, Phone_Number, Check_In, Check_Out, and Guest_Count
3. Click the Book Now button
test_cases.expected_result: Action is blocked due to authentication precondition; user is redirected to the Login page (or a login prompt/modal is shown) and booking is not created. User does not reach the Payment page.

test_cases.test_case: Submit booking form when read-only required fields (Selected_Hotel/Selected_Room_Type/Room_Rate) are not populated
preconditions: User is logged in
Booking Form is reachable (tester navigates directly to the Booking Form URL without selecting a room)
steps: 1. Navigate directly to the Booking Form page/URL without first clicking Select Room on the Hotel Details page
2. Ensure Selected_Hotel and Selected_Room_Type and read-only price fields are empty
3. Enter valid values for First_Name, Last_Name, Email, Phone_Number, Check_In, Check_Out, and Guest_Count
4. Click the Book Now button
test_cases.expected_result: Form does not submit; Selected_Hotel field displays an inline validation error indicating it is required and must be populated by selecting a room; Selected_Room_Type and Room_Rate (and other read-only required price fields) display inline errors indicating they are required. Booking is not created and the user remains on the Booking Form.

test_cases.test_case: Earliest same/next-day booking allowed (Check_In = <today>, Check_Out = <today + 1 day>)
preconditions: User is logged in
Hotel details page is open and at least one room row is present
steps: 1. Click 'Select Room' on a room row

8. Enter a valid Email
9. Enter a valid Phone_Number
10. Click 'Book Now'
test_cases.expected_result: Form submission succeeds: user is redirected to the Payment page and Booking_Form read-only fields (Selected_Hotel, Selected_Room_Type, Room_Rate, Taxes, Fees, Total) remain populated with the selected room's values; the redirect to Payment page is visible

test_cases.test_case: Booking blocked when Check_In is in the past (Check_In = <yesterday>)

test_cases.expected_result: Submission is blocked / error shown: the Check_In field displays an inline error indicating the date is in the past and the form does not redirect to the Payment page

test_cases.test_case: Same-day check-in and check-out (Check_Out = Check_In) — zero-night stay boundary
preconditions: User is logged in

preconditions: User is logged in

test_cases.test_case: Rapid double-click of 'Book Now' should not create duplicate bookings

test_cases.test_case: Rapidly selecting two different rooms before Booking_Form fully opens populates form with the last selection (last-click wins)

test_cases.test_case: Round-trip reveals Return_Date and accepts same-day return
preconditions: Flights_Search_Form is visible
Trip_Type field exists (type: dropdown)
Departure_Date and Return_Date fields exist (type: date); Return_Date has visible_when = Trip_Type == Round-trip
steps: 1. Select Trip_Type = Round-trip
2. Enter <today> in Departure_Date
3. Enter <today> in Return_Date (same-day return)
4. Fill required city search fields with valid entries
5. Click Search
test_cases.expected_result: Search submits successfully; user is redirected to the listing page (redirects to listing page) — same-day Return_Date is accepted and search completes (succeeds).

test_cases.test_case: Return_Date value is not applied after switching Trip_Type from Round-trip to One-way
preconditions: Flights_Search_Form is visible
Return_Date has visible_when = Trip_Type == Round-trip
steps: 1. Select Trip_Type = Round-trip
2. Enter <valid date> in Departure_Date
3. Enter <valid date after Departure_Date> in Return_Date
4. Switch Trip_Type = One-way (causing Return_Date to become hidden)
5. Fill required city search fields with valid entries
6. Click Search
test_cases.expected_result: Search submits successfully and returns results for a one-way search (succeeds); the previously-entered Return_Date is not applied in the search because the field was hidden (its value is ignored/cleared).

test_cases.test_case: Departure_Date set to a far-future date is accepted by the search
preconditions: Flights_Search_Form Departure_Date is type: date
steps: 1. Enter <far future date> in Departure_Date
2. Fill required city search fields with valid entries
3. Click Search
test_cases.expected_result: Search submits successfully and the listing page loads (succeeds); listing page either displays matching flights for the far-future date or displays a 'No flights found' passive message — the search action itself completes successfully.

test_cases.test_case: Departure_Date set to a past date (yesterday) is rejected
preconditions: Flights_Search_Form Departure_Date is type: date
steps: 1. Enter <yesterday> in Departure_Date
2. Fill required city search fields with valid entries
3. Click Search
test_cases.expected_result: Search is blocked / error shown: an inline error is displayed on the Departure_Date field indicating the date is in the past and the search is not submitted (is blocked / error shown).

test_cases.test_case: Rapid double-click of Search only triggers one search/redirect
preconditions: Flights_Search_Form has a Search submit_actions element that redirects to listing page
steps: 1. Fill required fields in Flights_Search_Form (Departure_City, Arrival_City, Departure_Date)
2. Double-click the Search button rapidly (two clicks in quick succession)
test_cases.expected_result: Only one search submission is processed; only one redirect to the listing page occurs and only one set of results load (Second submission attempt is blocked); no duplicate navigations or duplicated result sets appear (succeeds).

test_cases.test_case: Rapid expand/collapse of a listing row remains stable and shows single details panel
preconditions: Flights_Listing rows are row_expandable (reveals additional flight details)
steps: 1. From a populated Flights_Listing, identify a single row
2. Click to expand the row (reveal details)
3. Immediately collapse the row
4. Immediately expand the row again (repeat expand/collapse rapidly multiple times)
test_cases.expected_result: Rapid consecutive expand/collapse actions succeed; the details panel shows the expected baggage allowance, fare rules, and seat availability once with no duplicated sections or lingering artifacts (succeeds).

test_cases.test_case: Double-click Select on a flight only triggers a single selection action
preconditions: Flights_Listing has row_actions with action_name = Select
steps: 1. On a Flights_Listing row, click the Select button twice rapidly
test_cases.expected_result: Only one selection action is processed; user-visible confirmation of selection appears only once and subsequent rapid clicks are ignored (Second selection attempt is blocked); no duplicate selection confirmations are shown (succeeds).

test_cases.test_case: Leading/trailing whitespace in Departure_City is trimmed before search
preconditions: Departure_City is type: search (free-text/autocomplete field)
steps: 1. Enter '  <valid city>  ' (leading and trailing whitespace around a valid city token) into Departure_City
2. Fill Arrival_City and Departure_Date with valid entries
3. Click Search
test_cases.expected_result: Search submits successfully; the Departure_City input is trimmed of leading/trailing whitespace before submission and the search executes for '<valid city>' (succeeds).

test_cases.test_case: Search form redirects to Tours Listing page and shows results
preconditions: User on Tours Search page
steps: 1. Enter <destination> in the Destination field on the Tours Search form
2. Select <travel start date> in Travel Start Date and <travel end date> in Travel End Date
3. Select <tour type> from Tour Type
4. Enter <min days> in Duration Min Days and <max days> in Duration Max Days
5. Enter <min budget> in Budget Min and <max budget> in Budget Max
6. Click the Search button
test_cases.expected_result: Tours Listing page is displayed with the Results list visible; one or more tour cards are shown and each visible card includes an image, tour name, destination, duration, starting price per person, a brief description, availability status, and traveler rating.

test_cases.test_case: Applying sidebar filters narrows results to matching tours
preconditions: User on Tours Search page
steps: 1. On Tours Search page, enter <destination> and click Search to open the Tours Listing page
2. In the Filters sidebar, enter <destination> in Destination
3. Select <tour type> from Tour Type in the Filters sidebar
4. Enter <price min> in Price Min and <price max> in Price Max
5. Enter <duration min> in Duration Min Days and <duration max> in Duration Max Days
6. Enter <departure start date> in Departure Start Date and <departure end date> in Departure End Date
7. Select 'Price' from the Sort By dropdown to refresh results ordering
test_cases.expected_result: Results list displays only tour cards that match the entered Destination and selected Tour Type, with starting prices within the specified price range, durations within the specified day range, and departure dates within the specified date range; unrelated tour cards are no longer visible.

test_cases.test_case: Sort control reorders results by Rating
preconditions: User on Tours Search page
steps: 1. On Tours Search page, enter <destination> and click Search to open the Tours Listing page with multiple results
2. Click the Sort By dropdown
3. Select 'Rating' from the Sort By options
test_cases.expected_result: Results list is reordered according to traveler rating; the top visible tour card has the highest traveler rating among the displayed results.

test_cases.test_case: Tour card displays required fields on the listing
preconditions: User on Tours Search page

2. Inspect the first tour card in the Results list
test_cases.expected_result: The inspected tour card shows an image, the tour name, destination, duration, starting price per person, a brief description, availability status, and traveler rating.

3. Enter <valid number> into the Age field
4. Enter <valid license number> into the License Number field

6. Enter <valid phone number> into the Phone Number field
7. Select <an insurance plan> from the Insurance Plan dropdown

9. Click the Confirm Booking button

test_cases.test_case: Leave required email field blank and attempt to confirm

3. Enter <valid number> into the Age field
4. Enter <valid license number> into the License Number field
5. Select <a country> from the License Issue Country dropdown

7. Select <an insurance plan> from the Insurance Plan dropdown
8. Check the Accept Terms checkbox
9. Click the Confirm Booking button
test_cases.expected_result: Inline validation error appears on the Email field indicating it is required; the form does not submit; Confirm Booking does not proceed to payment and the user remains on the booking page

test_cases.test_case: Attempt to Confirm Booking without accepting terms (precondition failure)
preconditions: User is on the Car Booking page with selected vehicle and rental details displayed
All required fields are filled with valid values except Accept Terms remains unchecked
steps: 1. Enter <valid full name> into the Driver Full Name field
2. Enter <valid number> into the Age field
3. Enter <valid license number> into the License Number field

5. Enter <valid email address> into the Email field
6. Enter <valid phone number> into the Phone Number field

test_cases.test_case: Submit the form with ALL required fields empty

test_cases.test_case: Driver Full Name with leading and trailing whitespace is trimmed on save
preconditions: Car Booking page open with a vehicle selected and rental details visible
User is on the booking form

9. Click Confirm Booking
test_cases.expected_result: Form submission succeeds and proceeds to payment; the booking summary/confirmation displays Driver_Full_Name with leading and trailing whitespace removed (trimmed).

test_cases.test_case: Confirm Booking remains disabled / blocked until Accept_Terms is checked
preconditions: Car Booking page open with a vehicle selected and rental details visible
User is on the booking form
steps: 1. Enter <valid full name> in the Driver_Full_Name field
2. Enter <valid age> in the Age field
3. Enter <valid license number> in the License_Number field
4. Select <valid country> in the License_Issue_Country dropdown
5. Enter <valid email> in the Email field
6. Enter <valid phone number> in the Phone_Number field

test_cases.test_case: Rapid double-click of Confirm Booking prevents duplicate bookings
preconditions: Car Booking page open with a vehicle selected and rental details visible
All required fields are filled with valid values
Accept_Terms is checked
steps: 1. Click Confirm Booking twice rapidly (double-click) within a short interval
test_cases.expected_result: First submission succeeds and proceeds to payment; the second rapid click is ignored/blocked and does not create a duplicate booking. Only one booking record appears in the booking list/confirmation and only a single redirect to payment occurs (second attempt is blocked / error shown if the UI displays duplicate-prevention feedback).

test_cases.test_case: Very long License Number input (>200 characters) is rejected with visible error

8. Check Accept_Terms
9. Click Confirm Booking
test_cases.expected_result: Form submission is blocked; an inline error is shown next to License_Number indicating the input exceeds allowed length (progression is blocked / error shown).

test_cases.expected_result: displays visa requirements for selected Nationality and Destination Country

test_cases.test_case: Submit a visa application with required personal info, file uploads and one supporting document
preconditions: User logged in as <Traveler>
steps: 1. Navigate to the Visa Application form within the Visa Services module
2. Enter <full name> in the Full Name field
3. Enter <passport number> in the Passport Number field
4. Select <passport expiry date> in the Passport Expiry Date field
5. Select <date of birth> in the Date of Birth field
6. Select <Nationality> from the Nationality dropdown
7. Enter <email address> in the Email field
8. (optional) Enter <phone number> in the Phone field
9. (optional) Enter <purpose of visit> in the Purpose of Visit field
10. (optional) Select <intended travel start date> and <intended travel end date>
11. (optional) Enter <duration of stay> in the Duration of Stay field
12. Click Upload for Passport Copy and select a <valid passport file> from the OS file dialog
13. Click Upload for Photographs and select a <valid photograph file> from the OS file dialog
14. Click Add on Supporting Documents to create a new supporting document row
15. In the new supporting document row, click Upload for Document and select a <valid supporting document file>, then enter <description> in the Description field
16. Click the 'Submit Application' button
test_cases.expected_result: application submitted and appears in Bookings dashboard for tracking

test_cases.test_case: Open a submitted application from the Bookings dashboard to view application details and status
preconditions: User logged in as <Traveler>
A submitted visa application exists in the Bookings dashboard for <applicant>
steps: 1. Navigate to the Bookings section of the Visa Services module
2. Locate the row for the submitted application for <applicant> in the Bookings table
3. Click the 'View Application' row action for that application
test_cases.expected_result: Visa application detail view opens showing the application summary and current status badge for the selected application

test_cases.test_case: Submit application with ALL required fields empty
preconditions: User is on the Visa Application Form page
steps: 1. Leave every required field blank (Full_Name, Passport_Number, Passport_Expiry_Date, Date_of_Birth, Nationality, Email, Passport_Copy, Photographs)
2. Click the 'Submit Application' button
test_cases.expected_result: Form does not submit; application is not created; inline validation errors appear on the following fields indicating they are required: Full_Name, Passport_Number, Passport_Expiry_Date, Date_of_Birth, Nationality, Email, Passport_Copy, Photographs. User remains on the Visa Application Form.

test_cases.test_case: Leave required text field (Full Name) blank and submit
preconditions: User is on the Visa Application Form page
steps: 1. Leave the Full_Name field blank
2. Fill all other required fields with valid values and attach required files for Passport_Copy and Photographs
3. Click the 'Submit Application' button
test_cases.expected_result: Form does not submit; application is not created; an inline validation error appears on the Full_Name field indicating it is required (Full_Name field displays an error: 'This field is required' or equivalent).

test_cases.test_case: Leave required date field (Passport Expiry Date) blank and submit
preconditions: User is on the Visa Application Form page
steps: 1. Leave the Passport_Expiry_Date field blank
2. Fill all other required fields with valid values and attach required files for Passport_Copy and Photographs
3. Click the 'Submit Application' button
test_cases.expected_result: Form does not submit; application is not created; an inline validation error appears on the Passport_Expiry_Date field indicating it is required (Passport_Expiry_Date field displays an error: 'This field is required' or equivalent).

test_cases.test_case: Leave required dropdown (Nationality) blank and submit
preconditions: User is on the Visa Application Form page
steps: 1. Leave the Nationality dropdown unselected
2. Fill all other required fields with valid values and attach required files for Passport_Copy and Photographs
3. Click the 'Submit Application' button
test_cases.expected_result: Form does not submit; application is not created; an inline validation error appears on the Nationality field indicating it is required (Nationality field displays an error: 'Please select a value' or equivalent).

test_cases.test_case: Leave required email field blank and submit
preconditions: User is on the Visa Application Form page
steps: 1. Leave the Email field blank
2. Fill all other required fields with valid values and attach required files for Passport_Copy and Photographs
3. Click the 'Submit Application' button
test_cases.expected_result: Form does not submit; application is not created; an inline validation error appears on the Email field indicating it is required (Email field displays an error: 'This field is required' or equivalent).

test_cases.test_case: Leave a required file upload (Passport Copy) blank and submit
preconditions: User is on the Visa Application Form page
steps: 1. Do not attach a file to the Passport_Copy upload control
2. Fill all other required fields with valid values and attach a file to Photographs

test_cases.expected_result: Form does not submit; application is not created; an inline validation error appears on the Passport_Copy file upload field indicating a file is required (Passport_Copy field displays an error: 'This file is required' or equivalent).

test_cases.test_case: Enter invalid email format and submit
preconditions: User is on the Visa Application Form page
steps: 1. Enter <invalid email format> into the Email field
2. Fill all other required fields with valid values and attach required files for Passport_Copy and Photographs
3. Click the 'Submit Application' button
test_cases.expected_result: Form does not submit; application is not created; the Email field displays an inline validation error indicating invalid format (Email field displays an error: 'Must be a valid email address' or equivalent).

test_cases.test_case: Add a Supporting Document item but leave its required Document file blank

test_cases.expected_result: Form does not submit; application is not created; an inline validation error appears on the Document file upload within the newly added Supporting_Documents item indicating the file is required (Supporting_Documents -> Document field displays an error: 'This file is required' or equivalent).

test_cases.test_case: Passport expiry = today (boundary) is rejected

test_cases.test_case: Intended travel start date = end date (same-day travel) is allowed

test_cases.test_case: Intended travel start date is after end date (end before start) is blocked

test_cases.test_case: Very long Full Name input to test storage/display of long text

test_cases.test_case: Email field with leading and trailing whitespace is trimmed on save

2. Fill all other required fields with valid values

4. Open the created application from the Bookings dashboard and view the Email value on the detail page
test_cases.expected_result: Form submits successfully; the Email value shown on the application detail page has leading and trailing whitespace removed (email is trimmed in saved output)

test_cases.test_case: Rapid double-click of Submit Application button does not create duplicate applications

steps: 1. Prepare the Visa Application form with all required fields completed
2. Rapidly double-click the Submit Application button (two clicks within a short interval)
3. After submission, navigate to the Bookings dashboard
test_cases.expected_result: Only one application record is created in the Bookings dashboard; duplicate creation is blocked and no duplicate row appears (only one record is shown; duplicate submission prevented)

test_cases.test_case: Add supporting documents then remove all entries and submit (repeating group min=0)

4. Remove the first Supporting_Documents entry
5. Remove the second Supporting_Documents entry (leaving zero entries)
6. Fill all other required fields with valid values
7. Click Submit Application
test_cases.expected_result: Form submits successfully; application appears in the Bookings dashboard and the application detail shows an empty Supporting Documents section (submission succeeds since repeating group min = 0)

test_cases.test_case: Authenticated user's currency preference is saved to profile and persists after logout/login

8. Log in again with the same authenticated user account
9. Navigate to a page that displays prices
test_cases.expected_result: The selected currency is saved to the user's profile and remains the user's preference after logout and subsequent login: the account/profile preferences page displays the chosen currency and, after re-login, prices on the site are displayed using that saved currency; saving the preference succeeds and the saved value is visible in the profile UI.

4. Observe whether the selected currency is applied in the new tab
5. Open a new private/incognito window and navigate to the site home page
test_cases.expected_result: Preference storage in session/cookie behaves as a session-scoped preference: the unauthenticated currency selection persists within the same browsing session and is applied in the newly opened normal tab (preference shown and prices displayed in selected currency) — this part succeeds; in a new private/incognito browser session the previously selected unauthenticated preference is not applied (site falls back to default currency) — this part succeeds and indicates session-scoped storage.

3. Click into the Offers Filters End_Date field

5. Click the Apply/Submit Filters button
test_cases.expected_result: Applying filters succeeds; offers list updates to show deals valid on <date X>; no inline error is shown on either date field and an active filter tag (or similar UI element) displays the selected date range

test_cases.test_case: End_Date one day before Start_Date (date-order violation)
preconditions: Offers page is open and deals list is visible
steps: 1. Click into the Offers Filters Start_Date field
2. Enter <date Y> in Start_Date
3. Click into the Offers Filters End_Date field
4. Enter <one day before date Y> in End_Date
5. Click the Apply/Submit Filters button
test_cases.expected_result: Filter submission is blocked / error shown; the End_Date field displays an inline error indicating the end date cannot be before the start date (filter application is prevented) and the offers list does not update

test_cases.test_case: Start_Date set to today (date edge)
preconditions: Offers page is open and deals list is visible
steps: 1. Click into the Offers Filters Start_Date field
2. Enter <today's date> in Start_Date
3. Leave End_Date empty
4. Click the Apply/Submit Filters button
test_cases.expected_result: Applying filters with Start_Date = <today's date> succeeds; offers list updates to show deals valid from today onward (UI shows active Start_Date filter tag or similar); no error is shown for choosing today's date

test_cases.test_case: Very long Destination string (>200 characters)
preconditions: Offers page is open and deals list is visible
steps: 1. Click into the Offers Filters Destination search field
2. Enter a very long string (more than 200 characters) into Destination
3. Click the Apply/Submit Filters button
test_cases.expected_result: Entering a >200-character value in Destination either succeeds (filters are applied) and the UI shows the active Destination filter truncated with an ellipsis in the filter chip or summary, or the Destination field displays a clear inline error indicating the input exceeds the allowed length (either outcome must be visible); no silent data loss occurs without a visible indicator

test_cases.test_case: Newsletter email with leading and trailing whitespace is submitted
preconditions: Offers page is open and Newsletter Subscription component is visible
steps: 1. Click into the Newsletter_Subscription Email field
2. Enter an email value with leading and trailing whitespace in the Email field (e.g., ' <email> ')
3. Click the Subscribe / Submit button for Newsletter_Subscription
test_cases.expected_result: Subscription submission succeeds; the UI confirms submission and any displayed email in the confirmation message or active subscription list shows the email trimmed of leading/trailing whitespace (no whitespace stored/shown); no validation error is shown for trimmed input

test_cases.test_case: Rapid double-click on a deal's Book_Now button
preconditions: Offers page is open and at least one deal card or promotional banner is visible in Deals_List or Promotional_Banners
steps: 1. Identify a visible deal card's Book_Now button
2. Double-click (two rapid clicks) the Book_Now button
test_cases.expected_result: Only one booking flow is initiated (single redirect or single application of the promotional code) and the UI shows a single navigation/action; the second rapid click is ignored or de-duplicated and no duplicate booking flows or duplicate promotional-code applications occur (user-visible: only one redirect or one confirmation shown)

test_cases.test_case: Clicking Logout redirects to Home and hides authenticated UI
preconditions: User logged in as <User>
Logout button is visible in the application header
steps: 1. Click the 'Logout' button in the application header
test_cases.expected_result: User is redirected to the Home page; public Home page content is visible and authenticated navigation items (including the 'Logout' button) are no longer visible

test_cases.test_case: After logout, attempting to access a protected page redirects to Login
preconditions: User logged in as <User>
Logout button is visible in the application header
steps: 1. Click the 'Logout' button in the application header
2. Enter <protected page URL> in the browser address bar and press Enter
test_cases.expected_result: Browser redirects to the Login page; the Login form is displayed and protected page content is not visible

test_cases.test_case: Attempt Logout action while not logged in (direct URL access)
preconditions: User is not logged in
steps: 1. Open the browser and ensure no authenticated session exists (user is logged out)
2. Enter the application's Logout URL (e.g., navigate to the Logout endpoint) in the address bar and press Enter
test_cases.expected_result: Navigation is blocked: the application redirects to the Login page; Login page is displayed and no session termination/home redirect occurs because no session existed (user remains unauthenticated).

test_cases.test_case: Logout control is not available in UI when user is not logged in
preconditions: User is not logged in
steps: 1. Open the application's home page while not authenticated
2. Inspect the page header/navigation area for a Logout control
test_cases.expected_result: Logout button/control is not visible or available in the UI (no clickable Logout control is present); user cannot click Logout from the page while unauthenticated.

test_cases.test_case: Rapid double-click of Logout button
preconditions: user must be logged in
user is on an authenticated page in the app
steps: 1. Click the Logout button
2. Immediately click the Logout button a second time (within a fraction of a second)
3. Observe the current page and any redirects
4. From the current page, navigate to a protected page (e.g., click a link that requires authentication)
test_cases.expected_result: Logout succeeds: user is redirected to the home page (single visible redirect). No duplicate logout UI (no second redirect loop or duplicate confirmation) appears. Subsequent navigation to a protected page is blocked and redirects to the login page.

test_cases.test_case: Logout then press browser Back to return to previously viewed protected page
preconditions: user must be logged in
user has a protected page in the browser history (visited while logged in)
steps: 1. Click the Logout button
2. Confirm the app redirects to the home page
3. Click the browser Back button once to attempt to return to the previously viewed protected page
4. Observe the page displayed
test_cases.expected_result: Access to the previously viewed protected page is blocked: the browser does not display the protected content and instead redirects to the login page (or shows the app's login screen). The protected page content is not visible after using Back.

test_cases.test_case: Logout in one tab while another tab has a protected page open; then attempt actions in the other tab
preconditions: user must be logged in in both Tab A and Tab B
Tab B currently has a protected page open (not yet refreshed)
steps: 1. In Tab A, click the Logout button
2. In Tab B, attempt to interact with the protected page (e.g., click a link or click Refresh)
3. Observe the result shown in Tab B
test_cases.expected_result: Access from Tab B is blocked: after the logout in Tab A the protected page in Tab B fails to show protected content and redirects to the login page when an action or refresh is attempted. The user cannot perform authenticated actions from Tab B after logout.

test_cases.test_case: Enter a bookmarked/protected page URL after logout
preconditions: user must be logged in
user has a protected page URL bookmarked or copied
steps: 1. Click the Logout button
2. Confirm the app redirects to the home page
3. In the browser address bar, paste/enter the protected page URL and press Enter
4. Observe the page displayed
test_cases.expected_result: Access is blocked: entering the protected page URL after logout redirects the user to the login page and the protected content is not displayed.
